Body.Content:
When you are in meetings or calls, you will be able to pop out, drag, and resize your meeting panes from the meeting window. This includes Chat, Copilot, and Notes side panes.

GA date: January CY2025
Body.Markdown:
When you are in meetings or calls, you will be able to pop out, drag, and resize your meeting panes from the meeting window. This includes Chat, Copilot, and Notes side panes.

GA date: January CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: When you are in meetings or calls, you will be able to pop out, drag, and resize your meeting panes from the meeting window. This includes Chat, Copilot, and Notes side panes.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: In-meeting Chat, Copilot, and Notes panes can be popped out from the meeting window
